creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
Update the master_site for the audio/cmp3 port.  The md5 change appears
to be a slight bugfix applied without changing the version number.

Fix: 

-Chris--l51STt29xwDBq3fnxLUP3o5wKgVcncvJ99usGUAbUXKXYWwr
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: cmp3/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /cvs/FreeBSD/ports/audio/cmp3/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.3
diff -u -r1.3 Makefile
--- Makefile	1999/04/15 03:10:06	1.3
+++ Makefile	1999/05/12 04:40:31
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
 DISTNAME=	cmp3-2.0pre3
 PKGNAME=	cmp3-2.0p3
 CATEGORIES=	audio
-MASTER_SITES=	http://nkk104.rh.psu.edu/cmp3/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.personal.psu.edu/users/n/k/nkk104/cmp3/	
 
 MAINTAINER=	cpiazza@home.net
